dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Manual Test
dashboard.description: Test URLs with the phishiqplus command: single URL, pasted batch, or a lookup table (CSV) in this app.

div.p: This TA is installed as app id phishiq_ta (label: PhishIQPlus Technical Add-on). Use the app picker next to the Splunk logo (top left) and select that app so inputlookup finds CSVs under etc/apps/phishiq_ta/lookups/.

input.label: 2) Lookup table name (CSV lookup in this app)
3) Batch URLs — separate with | (pipe). Example: https://a.com|https://b.com

search.query: | makeresults count=1 | eval url="$test_url$" | phishiqplus url_field=url | table _time url phishiq_prediction phishiq_source phishiq_confidence phishiq_risk_level phishiq_cached phishiq_error

| inputlookup $lookup_table$ | fields url | where isnotnull(url) AND url!="" | head 500 | phishiqplus url_field=url | table _time url phishiq_prediction phishiq_source phishiq_confidence phishiq_risk_level phishiq_cached phishiq_error

| makeresults count=1 | eval raw="$batch_urls$" | makemv delim="|" raw | mvexpand raw | eval url=trim(raw) | where url!="" AND match(url, "^[Hh][Tt][Tt][Pp][Ss]?://") | head 500 | phishiqplus url_field=url | table _time url phishiq_prediction phishiq_source phishiq_confidence phishiq_risk_level phishiq_cached phishiq_error
